summary.overallRisk: HIGH — implicit contracts and validation gaps create batch position consistency risks

phase1_critical.rationale: Batch position must be contiguous in topological order; no gaps allowed. Current code doesn't validate.
checks: assertContiguousBatch(position) — validate no gaps in topo order
assertClaimability(batch) — all nodes in batch are claimable

phase1_critical.rationale: If produces files exist, completion record must exist with passing checks. Current tracking is lossy.
checks: syncCompletionWithProduces() — validates produces ↔ completion record equivalence
repairMissingCompletions() — back-fill completion records when produces exist
linkedGaps: VALIDATION-GAPS.md :: Cross-Rule Issues :: Redundant Validation Concerns

phase1_critical.requires: Implement intent rule type in validation layer
phase1_critical.rationale: intent rule declared in head.json (plan-clarity node) but handler not implemented. All plan nodes fail validation.
artifact-schema rule declared but not executed. Any node using it will always fail.

phase2_integration.requires: Add validation to advanceBatch() that current batch is complete
phase2_integration.rationale: advanceBatch() may be called prematurely if completion tracking is lossy.
checks: Validate current batch is fully complete before allowing advancement
Emit error with diagnose path if precondition fails

phase2_integration.requires: Implement consistency validator for contradictory rules
phase2_integration.rationale: shell passes but artifact-exists fails. No rule validates semantic contract holds.
checks: validateConsistency(completionRecord) — checks passing shell + artifact-exists align
linkedGaps: VALIDATION-GAPS.md :: Cross-Rule Issues :: No Cross-Rule Consistency

phase2_integration.requires: Consolidate artifact existence checks across systems
phase2_integration.rationale: Three parallel systems check artifact existence (protocol, evidence, validation). Single source of truth needed.
linkedGaps: VALIDATION-GAPS.md :: Cross-Rule Issues :: Redundant Validation Concerns

phase3_quality.requires: Add unit tests for partially-tested rules

checks: Add JSDoc to each rule type with preconditions
Add guard checks for shell, build-produces, launch-check

phase3_quality.requires: Track approvals with reviewer identity and reason
changes: Add approvedBy, approvedAt, reason fields to completion records
Validate reviewer identity in evidence layer

artifact-existence-checking.risk: MEDIUM — multiple sources of truth, can diverge
artifact-existence-checking.recommendation: Make completion-enforcer.ts (enforce-completion-sync node) the authoritative source

batch-position-computation.risk: MEDIUM — position can become stale if completion records lag
batch-position-computation.recommendation: Add batch-invariants.ts (enforce-batch-invariants node) to validate position consistency

validation-rule-execution.risk: HIGH — implicit preconditions, unclear execution order
validation-rule-execution.recommendation: Consolidate all rule execution under src/lib/protocol/validation.ts with explicit precondition checks

nextStepsAfterSynthesis: enforce-batch-invariants: Implement batch position checks (parallel with enforce-completion-sync)
enforce-completion-sync: Implement completion↔produces sync (parallel with enforce-batch-invariants)
test-enforcement: Write integration tests for all enforcement gates
final-synthesis: Validate enforcement on current dispatch-system-001 DAG, generate receipt

tests: Validate intent rule handler exists and works
Validate artifact-schema rule handler exists and works
Run all validation rules on dispatch-system-001 completion records

keyFindings: 6 critical gaps in batch advancement, completion sync, handoff boundaries
67% rule types tested (8/12 types have unit tests)
3 redundant validation systems with overlapping concerns
